programmes.show_description: This is CBBC! Tune every day from 7.00am.
CSI Mossy. Shaun uses his detective skills to try and track down Bitzer's whistle.
The Cute Shall Inherit the Earth. Animated series. Cute kittens are infiltrating positions of authority all around the world. Are they the feline equivalent of the illuminati?
Mermicorn. When granted a wish by a grateful witch, Blossom excitedly chooses a mermaid's tail. But she soon regrets the decision when trying to quest on land.

programmes.show_description: Witchcraft Game. Grizzy and the Lemmings play a game: it's the Lemmings Knights v the Bear Magician.
Man Ray Returns. Man Ray rents Squidward's house.
Gardener. Duck and Frog have a job tidying the mayor's garden, but then Frog builds an automatic lawnmower, which soon causes chaos. Can Duck get everything back on track in time?
Museum. Duck is at the museum to give a really boring talk about dinosaurs. When Frog steps in, he somehow manages to hatch a baby dinosaur from an ancient egg.

Dog Hand. The team think Raven's supervillain father is the coolest.

A tale from Quentin Blake's Box of Treasures. Happy couple Bella and George receive a parcel containing a baby named Zagazoo, who transforms into a series of badly behaved animals.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: A Couple of Dummies. Dad takes up ventriloquism as a hobby. The kids must find a way to stop Dad from embarrassing himself as he tries to showcase his new talent around town.

programmes.show_name: Shaun the Sheep: Mossy Bottom Mayhem
programmes.show_description: Run Shaun Run. Something is lurking in the swamp, and Shaun is not hanging around to find out what it is!
Musician. When Duck accidentally gets a job as the band conductor at the local park, Frog is keen to play trumpet in the band - but Duck is even more keen to stop him!
Removals. Duck and Frog must move a famous pop star's possessions from one mansion to another. However, they are unable to do it with anything remaining in one piece.

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: Every Which Way. Grizzy and the Lemmings fight for the last jar of Yummy with magic Mayan bracelets.
Simple Plan and the Invisible Madman. While travelling to a rock festival, the gang rescue a band from an invisible madman.
Mustard O' Mine. The Krusty Krab runs out of mustard.
Whale Watching. Mr Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl.
Wormhole. Max jumps into a wormhole and becomes a brave hero.
The Reckless Rescue Badge. After Orbit capture Ginny, can Tilda find a way to escape camp and save her best friend?
The Roman Coin Flex. Aoife's prank causes the school to be invaded by an archaeological team led by the eccentric Dr Ford. Can she dig the Vipers out before the big game?
What a Rollercoaster! Why do tummies flip on a rollercoaster? And find out how triage works in hospital.
Land of Fire and Ice. The Octonauts race to save a herd of reindeer as a volcanic eruption melts a glacier.
A Big Day Out for D.O.R.I.S. Dad gets trapped in the shower when D.O.R.I.S. decides to visit the sea. Can Big Lizard and Cosima stop her before she does herself permanent damage?
Looph's Frosty Feelings. When Looph unexpectedly loses a science competition, the Piris worry about her reaction.
Lighthouse. Duck and Frog have to change a lighthouse's light bulb, but things soon go badly wrong.
Herbert the Peculiar. The heroes quest to stop Balthazar from turning forest folk into household objects, using Herbert's magic tricks to defeat his wizardry.
Awesome Earwax! Why do ears have earwax, and how much do they make? And what happens when a person burps?
A to Bee Challenge. Adam and Joe become busy bees for a gunge-fuelled challenge - who will collect the most nectar and win Callum's ultimate respect?
Last to Leave the Circle. Callum inflicts terror and temptation on Adam and Joe to see who can impress him the most and be the 'last to leave the circle'!
Super Sheep. Under the guise of superhero Super Sheep, Shaun tries to restore peace to the farm.
Thumb Wars. In a somewhat misguided attempt to resolve Dennis and Walter's spiralling competitiveness, Miss Mistry offers thumb wrestling as a solution.
Cower Before Zorgoth. When a slug shrinks them down to the size of ants and threatens the entire forest, the heroes must embark on a dangerous quest to warn the Council.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: Don't Have a Cow. When the family visits a farm, Cheese bonds with Delilah the cow over all things dairy. However, bringing her home to live with the family leads to all sorts of problems!

Pizza. Duck has to deliver pizzas around the town, but he hasn't reckoned with the lengths that Frog will go to to get them all for himself.
The Grill Is Gone. A gang of kids steal the Krusty Krab's grill.
It's All Greek to Scooby. A medallion that Shaggy wears apparently causes an ancient myth to come to life.
Captain O's Birthday. Opie must collect enough money to pay for Captain O's ten-layer birthday cake.
Lazy Sunday. The Titans replace the couch with a treadmill.
We Are the Rising Volt Tacklers! The Rising Volt Tacklers reunite and prepare to take to the skies once more.

4/8. The school goes into lockdown when the Nameless attack. Gabriel and the gang are on a mission to discover the family secrets that Crookhaven is keeping hidden.
